use_cases: Hero section background with animated glowing lantern visuals
Splash page or loading screen with GPU-rendered ambient animation
Creative website decoration using procedural shader graphics
Landing page visual enhancement with ray-marched 3D effects
ai_summary: Xordev Lanterns is a WebGL shader component that renders animated floating lantern-like lights using ray marching. The fragment shader accumulates glow by marching through 3D space, producing soft glowing orbs with warm-to-cool color gradients. Time-based animation creates smooth floating motion, making it suitable for hero sections, splash pages, or ambient background visuals in SaaS and media applications.
